description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lantern that runs on push to master, main, cran/**, and libtorch-v1.11.0 branches. The workflow has two jobs: build and upload. The build job uses a matrix strategy to build on different operating systems (macOS, Windows, Ubuntu) with various CUDA configurations. It checks out the code, sets up CMake, creates a build directory, installs CUDA and cuDNN if required, runs CMake, builds the library, and uploads the artifact. The upload job depends on the build job, downloads the artifacts, zips them, and uploads them to Google Cloud Storage with the Google Cloud SDK.
